Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Complaint To Amend The Name Of Defendant
Off Calendar May-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's motion to amend the complaint to change the name of defendant is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =32/hk
